elements.original_description: A bright yellow smiling sun with rays radiating outward, positioned at the center of a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of a bright yellow smiling sun with cheerful expression and wide, radiant rays radiating outward, positioned perfectly at the center of a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, pure solid colors. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.

elements.original_description: The same yellow sun now dimmed to pale gray, with short faint rays, positioned at the center of a pure white background. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
elements.image_prompt: Professional 2D minimalist icon of the same sun now dimmed to a pale gray color, with a neutral or faded expression and short, faint rays, positioned perfectly at the center of a pure white background. Clean flat vector art, high contrast, no shading or gradients, pure solid colors. No text, no letters, no numbers, no watermarks.
